Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: funerary containers [300197579], ceremonial containers [300197576], containers by function or context [300197200], containers (receptacles) [300197197], Containers (hierarchy name) [300045611], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Boxes or chests in which a corpse is enclosed for burial.
Cajas o arcones para enterrar en ellos un cadáver.
Dozen of kisten om een lijk in te begraven.
Casse, generalmente di legno o metallo, destinata a ricevere il defunto per la sua sepoltura.
放置入斂屍體的箱子或櫃子。
Kiste oder Truhe, in die der Leichnam für die Beerdigung eingebettet wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000004411/Beard, National Trust Book of English Furniture (1985)
2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)

Term_Source.Page: Term added by consultants at 5/92 review.; caskets
